name: Vietnam's Northern Highlights
meta_desc: 10 days through Hanoi, Ha Long Bay, Ninh Binh and Sapa. A carefully crafted journey through Northern Vietnam's cities, bays and rice terraces.
tagline: 10 days through the vibrant streets of Hanoi, the emerald waters of Ha Long Bay, the limestone valleys of Ninh Binh and the misty rice terraces of Sapa.
hero_alt: Cruise ship among the limestone islands of Ha Long Bay
overview: Experience the very best of Northern Vietnam on this unforgettable journey through vibrant cities, breathtaking landscapes, rich cultural heritage and authentic local experiences. From the bustling streets of Hanoi to the emerald waters of Ha Long Bay, the dramatic limestone scenery of Ninh Binh, and the world-famous rice terraces of Sapa, this carefully crafted itinerary showcases the incredible diversity of Northern Vietnam. Designed for travellers seeking a balance of culture, adventure, relaxation and meaningful local encounters, this tour combines comfortable accommodation, expert local guides, outstanding cuisine and unforgettable experiences throughout the region.
highlights: Explore the fascinating streets, culture and cuisine of Hanoi
Experience a unique Army Jeep Tour through the capital's iconic landmarks
Cruise overnight through the spectacular UNESCO World Heritage Site of Ha Long Bay
Discover the stunning limestone landscapes of Ninh Binh, often called "Ha Long Bay on Land"
Visit Hoa Lu Ancient Capital, Trang An Landscape Complex and Bich Dong Pagoda
Journey through the magnificent mountain scenery of Sapa
Ride the Fansipan Cable Car to the highest peak in Indochina
Trek through Muong Hoa Valley and visit local ethnic minority communities
Enjoy authentic Vietnamese cuisine and local cultural experiences
Travel comfortably with private transportation and experienced local guides

itinerary.title: Welcome to Vietnam
itinerary.desc: Arrive in Hanoi and settle into the heart of the Old Quarter. Enjoy a welcome dinner and your first taste of Northern Vietnamese cuisine while soaking up the energy of Vietnam's vibrant capital.

itinerary.title: Discover Hanoi
itinerary.desc: Explore Hanoi's fascinating blend of ancient traditions and modern life. Travel through the city on a unique Army Jeep Tour, visit historic landmarks, discover hidden alleyways, and indulge in some of the country's finest local food.

itinerary.title: Cruise Ha Long Bay
itinerary.desc: Journey to the UNESCO World Heritage Site of Ha Long Bay and board your overnight cruise. Sail through emerald waters surrounded by towering limestone islands while enjoying activities such as kayaking, cave exploration, swimming and sunset views.

itinerary.title: From Sea to Mountains
itinerary.desc: Enjoy a peaceful morning on the bay before travelling to Ninh Binh, often referred to as "Ha Long Bay on Land." Relax amongst dramatic limestone peaks, winding rivers and tranquil countryside landscapes.

itinerary.title: Explore Ninh Binh
itinerary.desc: Discover the cultural and natural wonders of Ninh Binh. Visit the ancient capital of Hoa Lu, explore the UNESCO-listed Trang An Landscape Complex by boat, and admire the beauty of Bich Dong Pagoda.

itinerary.title: Journey to Sapa
itinerary.desc: Travel through Northern Vietnam's spectacular mountain scenery to Sapa. Upon arrival, unwind and enjoy breathtaking views of the region's world-famous rice terraces.

itinerary.title: Fansipan & Mountain Culture
itinerary.desc: Explore Sapa Town and nearby villages before ascending Fansipan Mountain via cable car to the highest peak in Indochina. Enjoy panoramic views across valleys, mountains and endless rice terraces.

itinerary.title: Trek Through the Rice Terraces
itinerary.desc: Experience one of Vietnam's most memorable adventures as you trek through the stunning Muong Hoa Valley. Meet local ethnic minority communities, learn about traditional lifestyles, and discover some of the country's most beautiful landscapes.

itinerary.title: Return to Hanoi
itinerary.desc: Travel back to Hanoi with time to relax, shop and explore before celebrating your journey with a farewell street food experience in the bustling Old Quarter.

itinerary.title: Farewell Vietnam
itinerary.desc: Enjoy a final morning at leisure before transferring to the airport for your onward journey, taking home unforgettable memories of Northern Vietnam.

accommodation.hotel: La Siesta Classic Ma May Hotel (or similar)

inclusions: Selected lunches and dinners as specified in the itinerary
Entrance fees and sightseeing activities as mentioned
Sapa trekking experience with local guide
exclusions: Drinks, alcoholic beverages and personal refreshments
Meals not specifically mentioned in the itinerary
Laundry services, telephone calls and minibar expenses
Additional airport transfers outside scheduled tour dates
Early check-in and late check-out fees
Any services not specifically mentioned under "Inclusions"
travel_notes: Best travel season: September to May
Moderate fitness level recommended for trekking activities in Sapa
Weather can vary significantly between Hanoi, Ha Long Bay, Ninh Binh and Sapa — layered clothing is recommended
Comfortable walking shoes are recommended throughout the journey
Travel insurance is compulsory for all travellers
flexible_note: This itinerary is designed as a private, tailor-made journey and can be fully customised to suit your interests, travel style, budget and preferred pace of travel. Whether you would like to upgrade accommodation, add extra experiences, extend your stay or modify activities, our team will be happy to create the perfect Vietnam adventure for you.
